revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required before production: (1) SCHEMA MISUSE — cherry_pick_moments[2] cites 'coaching_philosophy.bill_anchoring' for the 'Ion had the best pitch' warmth signal at 09:52. This is wrong. Replace with 'analysis_directives.trust_building_micro_trades' or the rapport/brand-equity dimension. (2) CLASSIFICATION ERROR — cherry_pick_moments[1] classifies the battery backup moment as 'cross_sell_miss' implying Ella should have named the Tesla Powerwall. The schema's setter_scope_discipline explicitly makes product naming closer-tier content. Reclassify as 'scope_bridge_miss' — the gap is the absent universal escape hatch sentence, not the absent product name. Update the codex_reference to 'coaching_philosophy.setter_scope_discipline' as primary. (3) MISSED MOMENTS — add three cherry_pick entries: (a) [01:14] competitive-context opening as a missed first-impression differentiation opportunity with a specific coaching alternative; (b) [03:05] 'I'll freeze to that' as a vulnerability_disclosure per schema empathy_on_vulnerability_disclosure framework (currently only treated as a product cross-sell, not as a trust gift requiring empathetic acknowledgment); (c) [04:08] 34-year homeowner tenure statement as a rapport anchor and long-term commitment signal Ella walked past. Additionally, the coaching_implication for cherry_pick_moments[0] should remove the fabricated contract-quality claim ('Ion's contracts are designed so you understand every clause') and replace with intent-only language that does not make factual promises about Ion's contracts the schema does not support.
